test.subject: Test message from ThingsBoard
test.body:
Test message from ThingsBoard
This email is indicating that your outgoing mail settings were set up correctly.
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

activation.subject: Your account activation on ThingsBoard
activation.body:
Activate your ThingsBoard account
To confirm your email address and choose a password, just click the button below.
We may need to send you critical information about our service and it is important that we have an accurate email address.
Activate your account
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

accountActivated.subject: ThingsBoard - your account has been activated
accountActivated.body:
Your ThingsBoard account has been activated
Congratulations! Your ThingsBoard account has been activated.
Now you can login to your ThingsBoard space.
Login
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

accountLockout.subject: Thingsboard - User account has been lockout
accountLockout.body:
Your ThingsBoard account has been locked out
Your ThingsBoard account has been locked out.
Thingsboard user account ${lockoutAccount} has been lockout due to failed credentials were provided more than ${maxFailedLoginAttempts} times.
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

resetPassword.subject: ThingsBoard - Password reset has been requested
resetPassword.body:
Password reset has been requested
You have requested password reset for your ThingsBoard account.
Click below in order to proceed password reset procedure.
Reset password
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

passwordWasReset.subject: ThingsBoard - your account password has been reset
passwordWasReset.body:
Your ThingsBoard account password has been reset
You have successfully created new password for your ThingsBoard account.
Now you can login to your ThingsBoard space using your newly created password.
Login
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

userActivated.subject: Thingsboard: user activated
userActivated.body:
User activated on ThingsBoard
User with name "${userFullName}" and email "${userEmail}" activated his/her account.
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

userRegistered.subject: Thingsboard: user registered
userRegistered.body:
New user registered on ThingsBoard
User with name "${userFullName}" and email "${userEmail}" registered on ThingsBoard.
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

apiUsageStateEnabled.subject: ThingsBoard: Account limits
apiUsageStateEnabled.body:
Your ThingsBoard account feature was enabled
We have enabled the ${apiFeature} for your account and ThingsBoard is already able to ${apiLabel} messages.
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

apiUsageStateWarning.subject: ThingsBoard: Account limits
apiUsageStateWarning.body:
Warning: your ThingsBoard account feature may be disabled soon
ThingsBoard has already ${apiValueLabel}.
${apiFeature} will be disabled for your account once the limit will be reached.
Please contact your system administrator to resolve the issue.
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.

apiUsageStateDisabled.subject: ThingsBoard: Account limits
apiUsageStateDisabled.body:
Your ThingsBoard account feature was disabled
We have disabled the ${apiFeature} for your account because ThingsBoard has already ${apiLimitValueLabel}.
Please contact your system administrator to resolve the issue.
— The ThingsBoard
This email was sent to ${targetEmail} by ThingsBoard.
